# Garmin MCP
Unofficial local-first Garmin Connect MCP server for AI sleep, HRV, Body Battery, stress and training-readiness agents.
Repository: https://github.com/davidmosiah/garminmcp
Homepage: https://wellness.delx.ai/connectors/garmin
NPM: https://www.npmjs.com/package/garmin-mcp-unofficial
Primary command: npm exec --yes --package=garmin-mcp-unofficial -- garmin-mcp-server doctor
MCP command: garmin-mcp-server

- MCP registry name: io.github.davidmosiah/garminmcp
- Start agents with garmin_connection_status and garmin_data_inventory before any data tool.
- Read-only default tools: garmin_agent_manifest, garmin_capabilities, garmin_privacy_audit, garmin_connection_status, garmin_data_inventory, garmin_daily_summary, garmin_weekly_summary, garmin_cache_status.
- Auth: personal Garmin Connect credentials (not OAuth — uses unofficial Connect web endpoints).
- Auth env: GARMIN_USERNAME, GARMIN_PASSWORD, or GARMIN_TOKEN_PATH for cached session.
- Optional env: GARMIN_PRIVACY_MODE (summary|structured|raw, default structured), GARMIN_CACHE, GARMIN_CACHE_PATH.
- Note: ToS-fragile by design — Garmin does not publish a public OAuth API for consumer data.
- Prefer JSON responses for automation and markdown responses for human summaries.
- Tokens stay local under ~/.garminmcp/tokens.json (or equivalent) and should never be printed.
- Not medical advice. Use as trend context only — outputs are operational context, not medical, legal or financial advice.
